name: Eagle Loan
description_short: Eagle Loan Company operates a physical branch location in Fairview Park, OH offering personal loan services with in-person consultation and support.
description_long:
Eagle Loan Company is an established personal loan provider with a physical branch presence, as evidenced by their Fairview Park, Ohio location. The company maintains a traditional brick-and-mortar model, allowing customers to visit in person for loan services. Their Fairview Park branch is staffed by loan officers, including Brad Anderson, and operates standard business hours Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. The company website provides basic branch information and directs customers to apply through their online application system.

Based on the available website content, Eagle Loan offers personal loan services, which typically serve customers needing funds for consolidation, purchases, medical expenses, and other personal financial needs. The company facilitates both in-person consultations at their physical location and online applications through their website. Customers can reach the Fairview Park branch directly at 216-350-4428 for inquiries about loan products and services.

What distinguishes Eagle Loan is their commitment to maintaining physical branch locations where customers can meet face-to-face with loan officers rather than conducting business entirely online. This approach appeals to consumers who prefer personal interaction when discussing loan options and terms. The company also provides directions and location information prominently on their website, emphasizing accessibility for their local market.

The website provides limited detailed information about specific loan products, terms, interest rates, or lending criteria. Prospective borrowers would need to contact the branch directly or complete an online application to learn about specific loan amounts, APR ranges, repayment terms, and qualification requirements. The company's online presence focuses primarily on branch location information rather than comprehensive product details.
pros: Physical branch location allows in-person loan consultations with trained staff
Direct phone line (216-350-4428) for immediate customer inquiries and support
Extended business hours (9 AM - 5 PM) Monday through Friday for working customers
Online application option available for customers who prefer remote processing
Established local presence in Fairview Park, OH market since branch exists
cons: Website lacks detailed information about loan products, amounts, rates, and terms
No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on the available website content
Limited online information requires customers to call or visit in person for specifics
No clear information about qualification requirements or credit score minimums
Website does not specify loan amounts offered, repayment terms, or processing timelines
best_for: Local Fairview Park and surrounding Ohio residents who prefer in-person loan consultations
Consumers who want to meet directly with a loan officer before committing to a personal loan
Borrowers comfortable with traditional banking methods and physical branch interactions
diagnosis: Eagle Loan is best for Ohio residents in the Fairview Park area who value face-to-face interaction with loan officers and prefer traditional branch banking. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal detail about specific loan products, rates, terms, and eligibility criteria—customers must contact the branch directly to obtain this essential information before applying.
services: In-person personal loan consultations at Fairview Park branch
Loan officer assistance (Brad Anderson listed as staff)
